actions.license_name: research dataset terms; verify before use
actions.reason: Useful auxiliary fixed-camera pedestrian data, not primary drone benchmark.
actions.expected_local_structure: dataset-specific raw trajectory + scene image/video files
manual_steps: Open the official URL.
Review and accept license/terms if you are eligible.
Download using the official instructions only.
Place/extract under one of the suggested local paths.
Rerun scripts/stage20_verify_local_paths.py with the dataset path.
